body:
This PR restores PvE attack effects in the main gameplay flow by wiring attackEffect state back into useGameLogic and Battlefield rendering.

Changes include:
- Restore attackEffect state flow in PvE gameplay
- Re-enable fire / water / nature sprite effects during combat
- Use normal-c-sheet effect for mixed-element attacks
- Keep existing effect assets and animation system
- Reduce attack effect scale on small screens for better mobile layout
- Preserve existing gameplay logic and UI structure
Verified locally in PvE gameplay and mobile viewport testing.

这个 PR 修复并恢复了 PvE 主流程中的攻击特效显示问题，将 attackEffect 状态重新接回 useGameLogic 与 Battlefield 的实际战斗渲染流程。

本次改动包括：
- 恢复 PvE 战斗中的 attackEffect 状态流
- 重新启用 fire / water / nature 元素攻击特效
- 混合元素攻击时使用 normal-c-sheet 白色斩击特效
- 继续复用现有 effects 资源与动画系统
- 优化小屏模式下的攻击特效尺寸，避免遮挡界面
- 保持原有 PvE 玩法逻辑与 UI 结构不变
已在本地 PvE 对局与移动端 viewport 下完成测试验证。
title: fix(game): restore and refine PvE attack effects
